examples: The engine's flywheel kept the crankshaft turning smoothly between power strokes.
Engineers added a heavier flywheel to reduce vibration.
The exercise bike's flywheel provided steady resistance.

The old steam engine relied on a massive iron flywheel.

arpabet: F AO1 R B EH2 R
definition: An ancestor.
etymology: From late Middle English, formed from fore- plus an old word meaning 'one who is or exists,' related to be.
examples: Her forebears settled the valley more than a century ago.
The museum traces the family's forebears back to colonial times.

arpabet: F AO0 R S T AO1 L
definition: To prevent, delay, or hinder something by taking action in advance.

arpabet: F AO2 R M Y AH0 L EY1 IH0 K
